name: Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct
short_description: Meet Qwen3-VL — the most powerful vision-language model in the Qwen series to date.
full_description: Meet Qwen3-VL — the most powerful vision-language model in the Qwen series to date. This generation delivers comprehensive upgrades across the board: superior text understanding & generation, deeper visual perception & reasoning, extended context length, enhanced spatial and video dynamics comprehension, and stronger agent interaction capabilities. Available in Dense and MoE architectures that scale from edge to cloud, with Instruct and reasoning‑enhanced Thinking editions for flexible, on‑demand deployment.
author: Qwen
